title: GEHU Time Table 2025 @ gehu.ac.in

detail.title: GEHU Time Table 2025 @ gehu.ac.in
detail.short_info: The officials of GEHU have released the GEHU Time Table 2025 for B.Sc/MBA Programmes. Students are advised to check the timetable to prepare for their exams.

content.text: GEHU Time Table 2025 is Out! The Graphic Era Hill University has released the B.Sc/MBA. For further updates on GEHU, candidates can follow this page.

sections.heading: How to Download the GEHU Time Table 2025?

content.text: Candidates follow the steps to download the Graphic Era Hill University Time Table 2025, candidates check the details and download it easily.

items: The University home page will open
The examination Schedules page will pop up
Time Table for different courses will show up for Regular and Regular / External.

rows: Term Evaluation Theory (Odd) Regular (Late Admission Students) Examination: November...
